description: Dynamic shared-library loader for trait dylibs: TOML discovery, filename convention, FFI dispatch, reload

features.name: dylib_name_to_trait_path conversion
features.description: Converts dylib filenames to trait dot-notation paths; first underscore becomes dot separator

features.name: TOML-based dylib discovery
features.description: Discovers cdylib plugins by reading .trait.toml files with source = "dylib" and loading companion .dylib/.so files. Derives trait path from filesystem structure.

features.name: DylibLoader load_all scans directories
features.description: load_all scans search directories recursively for dylib plugins using both TOML and filename discovery

features.name: DylibLoader dispatch
features.description: Dispatches calls to loaded dylib traits by path, serializing args as JSON

tests.name: dispatch to non-existent dylib returns gracefully

features.name: is_dylib file extension check
features.description: Recognizes .dylib and .so extensions as shared libraries

tests.name: cargo unit test covers is_dylib via dylib_name_to_trait_path test

features.name: TOML-first scan ordering
features.description: TOML discovery runs before filename convention so dylibs already loaded via TOML are not double-loaded

tests.name: no duplicate load warnings in clean startup
